perf.regime: pure-torch oracle: torch.cumsum (sequential fp32 prefix) + torch.searchsorted(right=True) + clamp to V-1. The RNG is EXTERNAL (uniform_samples is an input), so this is fully deterministic. Single fused expression; the baseline a Triton card replaces is the same math (the device kernel's value is fusing the prefix scan into one launch and avoiding the materialized [B,V] cdf).
